# Legacy `log-levels=` grammar corpus.
#
# One fixture per non-blank line. Format:
#
#   <expect> | <spec>
#
# where <expect> is:
#
#   ok:<expected directive>          exact directive equality required
#   ok-contains:<substring>          loose substring check for complex cases
#   err:<FilterError variant name>   expect this error variant
#
# The expected outputs are written by hand against the C++ easylogging++
# source (contrib/epee/src/mlog.cpp) and the test suite
# (tests/unit_tests/logging.cpp). DO NOT regenerate them by running the
# translator and capturing output.
#
# current_spec is always None for these cases; modifier (+/-) fixtures
# are covered by unit tests in src/legacy.rs because they require a
# current_spec argument.

# Empty / whitespace (current_spec=None path, so falls back to
# fallback_default which the test driver passes as WARN).
ok:warn|
ok:warn|   
ok:warn|	

# Numeric presets (match the golden files 1:1)
ok:warn,net=error,net::http=error,net::ssl=error,net::p2p=error,net::cn=error,daemon::rpc=error,global=info,verify=error,serialization=error,daemon::rpc::payment=error,stacktrace=info,logging=info,msgwriter=info|0
ok:info,global=info,stacktrace=info,logging=info,msgwriter=info,perf=debug|1
ok:debug|2
ok:trace|3
ok:trace|4

# Numeric + trailing categories (2 preset + one literal override)
ok:debug,foo=error|2,foo:ERROR

# Numeric out of range
err:NumericLevelOutOfRange|5
err:NumericLevelOutOfRange|99
err:NumericLevelOutOfRange|-1

# Star levels
ok:warn|*:WARNING
ok:debug|*:DEBUG
ok:trace|*:TRACE

# Prefix glob (dot-anchored, translates cleanly)
ok:perf=debug|perf.*:DEBUG
ok:net=error|net.*:FATAL

# Dotted names translate to `::` targets
ok:net::http=error|net.http:FATAL
ok:daemon::rpc::payment=error|daemon.rpc.payment:ERROR

# Suffix globs (rejected; first has no clean rewrite, second does)
err:UnsupportedGlob|*y.z:TRACE
err:UnsupportedGlob|*.dump:DEBUG

# Lowercase level accepted with a warning (substring match only because
# the warning text is not part of the grammar contract)
ok-contains:foo=debug|foo:debug

# Malformed
err:MalformedSpec|foo
err:UnknownLevel|foo:SHOUT

# Last-wins via two literal overlaps
ok:foo=warn,foo=debug|foo:WARNING,foo:DEBUG

# Unknown category passes through
ok:nonexistent_category=debug|nonexistent_category:DEBUG

# Real-world shapes found in USER_GUIDE.md and stressnet config examples
ok-contains:wallet::wallet2=trace|wallet.wallet2:TRACE
ok-contains:daemon=info|daemon:INFO
ok-contains:bcutil=warn|bcutil:WARNING
